items.h: AEW COLLISION HITS & MISSES (6/6): A show in need of more flair, Hazuki builds momentum ahead of Mercedes showdown, Divine Dominion retains titles, Taylor targets Moxley
items.p: To help you add context, my “Hits” are ordered from best to worst. With that said, let’s move into the high points of this week’s episode, starting with the most significant moments. HITS HAZUKI’S...

items.h: Road Dogg: WWE Looked At AEW Like, ‘That’s This Other Little Money Mark’s Company’
items.p: Road Dogg weighs in on how WWE viewed AEW. When AEW was announced in 2019, Triple H famously said during the D-Generation X Hall of Fame induction speech that WWE would buy “that pissant company”...

items.h: Road Dogg Thinks Wrestling Booking Is Now About The Money, ‘WWE Feels Like A Money Grab’
items.p: Road Dogg discusses how things changed when AEW came around. AEW has become a prominent competitor to WWE, making competitive monetary offers, securing top wrestlers who have left WWE, and landing...

items.h: RADICAN’S TAKE: Beyond Wrestling makes the best out of a difficult situation with Andrade el Idolo replacing MJF against Bobby Orlando in marquee match
items.p: When you’re running an independent promotion, it’s not often that you’re able to make the best out of a tough situation, but Beyond Wrestling owner and founder Drew Cordeiro managed to do just...

items.p: Revolution Pro Wrestling held its RevPro Live In London 108 event on June 7 from Porchester Hall in London, England, UK. The event aired on RevProOnDemand.com. Full results are below. RevPro Live...

items.h: AEW's Mick Foley Intends To Have A Conversation With Darby Allin About Taking Risks
items.p: New AEW star Mick Foley knows a thing or two about taking risks in the ring, and he believes that Darby Allin shouldn't be doing too much of it.

items.h: Kevin Knight Discusses His Place On The AEW Roster, Building Trust With Tony Khan
items.p: AEW star Kevin Knight has explained why he believes he's earned the trust of Tony Khan, and where he thinks his trajectory might take him in the company.

items.h: Injury Update On AEW Champion MJF, Following Removal From Indie Date
items.p: A new report provides an update on the status of AEW World Champion MJF following his hyperextended knee injury.
